subject: SIP Weekly Update - Week ending 20 Jun
deck_filename: Counter Taobao Weekly Update - Week ending 20 Jun.pdf

content.answer:
Hi Ian,

Performance Dashboard (as of 18 Jun)

A/ Topline/P&L

* Taobao program target ongoing adjustments

Highlights

   1.

   [Topline] Jun proj ADO 228k, 109% RR, %CB +0.3pp MoM; ADG $2.6M, 113%RR,
   %CB +0.9pp MoM
   1.

      Local SIP ADO 104% RR, %CB +0.2pp MoM; increase in %CB driven by 1)
      higher ads coverage with BPSF budget and ID fraud clawback amount, 2)
      upsized rebates for trendy assortment push
      2.

      CNSIP ADO 103% RR, %CB stable MoM; RR on target driven by ongoing
      optimization initiatives (e.g., ads markup removal for
non-performing SKUs)
      2.

   [P&L] Jun proj combined PC2 $3.55M, $0.16M over-performance
   1.

      Local SIP 0.35M out-performance, mainly due to higher ads take-rate
      earned by MP as SIP increases ads spending with BPSF budget
      2.

      CN SIP 0.2M under-performance, mainly due to reinvesting 5% GMV to
      counter revenue loss from mgt fee removal, to protect topline; will
      maintain reinvestment in Jun-Aug


B/ CNSIP revamp progress update

   1.

   New seller pitching/rejected seller repitching post management fee
   removal
   1.

      May pitching on 28 May: 45M SKUs pitched together with seller center
      announcement on management fee removal, 6M SKUs accepted (35%
success rate,
      lower than 60% target); to repitch rejected sellers 2 more times
(Jun, Jul)
      2.

      Jun pitching on 19 Jun
      1.

         Pitching content, SEH article, seller comms revamped
         2.

         Multiple pitching channels used: Shopee微信公众号, CNSC banner, 企业微信,
         卖家社群,etc
         3.

         35M SKUs from 18k GPs pitched; pitching result to be ready on 26
         Jun
         2.

   SKU migration efficiency improvement: WIP deep-dive SKU migration gap
   reason codes and improvement levers ETA 26 Jun


C/ BWT


Highlights

   1.

   MYSG, MYPH +0.2-0.4 days MoM due to FM delay from MY SPX sinc
